parameters.body: =fields name, slug, first_release_date, hypes, platforms.id, platforms.name, genres.name, cover.url, summary, involved_companies.company.name, involved_companies.developer, involved_companies.publisher, themes.name, game_modes.name, player_perspectives.name, franchises.name, collections.name, game_engines.name, similar_games.name, similar_games.genres.name, similar_games.rating, release_dates.human, release_dates.platform.name, release_dates.region, websites.url, websites.category, age_ratings.category, age_ratings.rating, language_supports.language.name, language_supports.language_support_type.name, alternative_names.name; where first_release_date > {{ Math.floor(Date.now()/1000) }} & first_release_date < {{ Math.floor(Date.now()/1000) + 7776000 }} & platforms = (6,130,167,169) & version_parent = null; sort first_release_date asc; limit 500;
